feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Custom fields for the App - Reassign Costs and Revenues
entry.content:
Is it possible to add custom fields to the app "Reassign Costs and Revenues"?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Change of bank key in banks and house bank
entry.content:
Hi SAP professionals,

We have a client S/4 HANA public cloud implementation project. We have created the bank - house bank - bank account - house bank account structure in DEV system and related to that also the bank determination config has been done based on that, using HB and HBA codes. 

Now the client wants to have bank key in bank changed from randomly what was in legacy system to SWIFT/BIC code. In 2 bank accounts for 2 banks, there are transactions already in DEV and TEST. 

How should we carry out the setup step by step in the right order. We only get errors referring to that something is in use already. 

Appreciate your comments very soon!

Br,

ME

entry.title: Controlling Area in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello everyone! Could you please explain to me why there can not be more than one Controlling Area in the SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud solution? 

thank you

entry.title: Greying out "Short Text" field in Display Purchase order in SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am Trying to make "Short Text" field in the item Overview tab in Display Purchase order(Me23n) App in public cloud. Means no User can change the text for the material even in changing mode.

I am new in Public cloud and i Don't know how to approach this problem.  
Please help me in solving this problem. Thank you all in advance.
Also i am attaching images for your reference.

entry.title: Inquiry about Outbound Delivery API in SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello,

I have an inquiry regarding the Outbound Delivery API in SAP Public Cloud.

I am looking for an API that allows split delivery document creation based on a generated sales order.
Is there an API in SAP Public Cloud that supports split delivery document creation based on a sales order?

Thank you.

entry.title: How to resolve the error KI280 "Define a cost element category for account &1 (controlling area &2)"
entry.content:
When I do migration for G/L balance and open item I faced the error "Define a cost element category for account & (controlling area *) ".

Below G/L accounts are affected. They are created additionally by copying the exisiting accounts in YCOA. They all belong to G/L account Type "Non Operating Expense or Income "

Can you help me resolve this issue.

 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Alternate to Warehouse managed Physical inventory process
entry.content:
For WMS we use four apps to complete the physical inventory procedure.

Create - > Enter count -> Confirm count/Post -> Confirm differences

We have a requirement to reduce the user intervention and make a one step process for the same.

Is there any other way we can do the same process with lesser steps/is there any way we can have 1 single app to do all the processes?



------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: S/4HANA Public Cloud: How to send an Email Notification if Batch Job fails
entry.content:
Hello,

in our former R/3 we were informed via EMAIL_NOTIFICATION_JOB if a job (e.g. the daily MRP run) failed.

Does a similar solution exist for S/4HANA Public Cloud?

 

Best Regards,

Ulrich

entry.title: Incorrect "House Bank" and "House Bank Account" in Check Cash Flow Item app?
entry.content:
Dear SAP,


We have notived an issue that the journal entries displayed in “APP: Manage Journal Entries” are correct, but when I try to check them in “APP: Check Cash Flow Item,” they do not show “House Bank： SKSFK” and “House Bank Account： TTUMI, but are linked to “House Bank： GNMHD” and “House Bank Account： FUTUU”



Could you please verify why this is happening?


The details are in the attached document.


Best PERSON_NAME,


Fujita


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SAP Demo Environment 2.0 not working in SAP S/4 Hana Public cloud edition in SAP FSM
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are following SAP Field Service Management with S/4HANA Service( https://content-discovery.int.sap/assets/demo-store/16946?referer=%2Fview%2Fafae0018-9b41-4aaf-af3f-418ccb0b8e81%3FcategoryItemIds%3Dproduct_LPR813

But when we enter the product id as per the script " MZ-SV-P0009 " we are getting the below error:

Could you please let us know how to resolve this or to raise it on which platform so that this can be resolved.

Thanks 

Lalitha Lingam

entry.title: Attachments in Project limit
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

can anyone please provide me information of documents attachments in Projects? I am working on SAP S/4HANA Cloud public edition and my customer asked me what is the storage limit for attachments in a project, enterprise projects.

Thanks in advance

entry.title: How add custom field on XML/PDF on a eDocument for Chile?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I need to add a custom field to the XML and PDF of an eDocument for Chile in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud. However, I haven't found a specific BAdI for Chile that allows adding custom fields.

I noticed that there is a BAdI called EDOC_MX_FILL_CUSTOM_DATA, which is used for other countries like Mexico to modify the eDocument XML before generation and another BAdI to add this field to PDF also for Mexico.  App Extensibility: eDocument Cockpit 

Would this BAdI work for Chile as well? If not, is there a General BAdI or another recommended approach to add custom fields to the eDocument XML/PDF for Chile?

I appreciate any insights or guidance you can provide.
Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Stay certified - Is an SAP Learning Hub subscription required for accessing new learning journeys?
entry.content:
Hi!

I received a notification recently that the C_S4CPB Implementation Consultant—SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition will expire in 8 weeks, and now I am supposed to take the assessment to extend the validity of my certification. However, my SAP Learning Hub subscription has expired, and I only see old learning materials for which I passed the assessment last year (for Cloud version 2402), not the new ones for version 2502. I know that taking the assessment requires an active SAP Learning Hub subscription, but does access to the latest learning journey also require a Learning Hub subscription?

Thanks for any help on this topic.

Mihael

entry.title: Activity Rate planning
entry.content:
Dear PERSON_NAME,
Could you please explain how to manage activity rates in planning concerning cost centers in the SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Fiori app? We have checked the Fiori Reference Library but could not find any relevant app.
In other private cloud or ECC systems, we typically use transaction codes KP26 and KBK6 to perform this task.
Looking forward to your guidance.
 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to Use Different Production Version for External Procurement and In-House Production in MRP?
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm currently using 'Both Procurement Types' for a specific semi-finished material, where the material is sometimes procured externally and sometimes produced in-house.

However, the BOM differs depending on the procurement type:

  • For External Procurement, the material follows one BOM structure.
  • For In-House Production, the material follows a different BOM structure (Alternative: 02).

To handle this, I have created alternative BOMs (two versions of BOM) and also defined two production versions.

Now, when MRP generates a planned order for this material:

  • If the planned order is converted into a purchase requisition, I want to use Production Version 001.
  • If the planned order is converted into a production order, I want to use Production Version 002.

Could anyone guide me on how to configure this in the system so that the correct production version is selected based on the procurement type?

Thanks.

entry.title: Inquiry about MRP plan order generation divided into production version
entry.content:
Hello, I am posting because I have an MRP question about the production version.

One material code uses two production versions. PIR established requirements using two production versions on a daily basis.

Because each production version has a different working line (routing), two production versions must be used in one material code.

In the PIR, the required amount was generated for each production version, and when the MRP is switched, it is combined into one production version based on the same date to create a planned order.

As shown in the picture below, I would really appreciate it if you could let me know if the PIR made for other production versions on the same date is divided into the same as PIR when executing the MRP, so that the planning order can be created for a total of two in the production version.


Please give me an answer that I can solve.
It's essential, so if you know it, please answer it.
Thank you.

entry.title: Upgrade impact to roles 2502
entry.content:
Our test system is upgraded to DIGITS and the production system will be upgraded this weekend.
here we are facing some challenges to identify role changes to adjust.
Kindly share some guides on this.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Changing pre-delivered master data in public cloud (FS items, subitems, document types, etc.)
entry.content:
Hi experts, 

Please advise on S/4HANA Public Cloud for Group Reporting.

There is a request to change descriptions of some pre-delivered master data such as FS items, subitems and document types because they are somewhat confusing.
To be more specific, our customer wants to change descriptions of the following master data:
- FS Item
- Subitem
- Breakdown Category
- Document Type
- Task
- Consolidation Method

Can they be changed as per customers' request?
Will they be overwritten by pre-delivered entries after upgrade?  

Regards,
Takashiro

entry.title: How to extend Flexible Workflow to BTP SBPA on Public cloud to change the final status of PO
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Currently we are trying to implement a Custom Workflow for PO using SAP Build Process Automation(SBPA) but while trying update the PO status field i.e."

PurchasingProcessingStatus" to approved or rejected in the PO API(api_purchaseorder- Version 4) it is a read only field and we are not able to use it, is there any alternative API or field to handle this?

kindly suggest if there is a way to change the status of the PO by linking the Task from Flexible workflow to SBPA. any other approach would also help.

Thank you n advance

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Extensibility   SAP Workflow Management, workflow capability  SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Sourcing and Procurement

entry.title: Ressource Related Billing, in IC Supplier Invoice marign is not posted
entry.content:
Dear SAP Team,

 

as part of IC Resource Related Billing for cost allocations (scope item 4AN) a margin should be posted in the IC debtor as well in the IC supplier invoice.

 

The margin is properly posted in the IC debtor invoice derived from the condition type. On the receiving side in the IC supplier invoice the margin should be also derived from the condition type based on the settings in SCCUI DIGITS. In this config steps, it seems to be possible to derive a margin account based on the condition type for the receiving company.

 

However, it does not work, also for the margin the expense account is determined.

 

How to ensure that the margin on the receiver side is also posted on a separate margin account based on the condition type?

 

 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.
